notes: v0.6.0 — Three big anti-hallucination upgrades. (1) Magenta window background: capture flips SU's BackgroundColor + SkyColor + GroundColor to #FF00FF before write_image so window/door openings show as magenta instead of being indistinguishable from white walls. The multi-view preamble explains 'magenta = render outdoor view through transparent glass'. Restore on exit (incl. raise). (2) Material reference table: every render call now includes a markdown table of the materials actually USED in the active scope — selection if non-empty, else the open container if user has double-clicked into a Group/Component, else the whole model — sent to Gemini as ground-truth so it stops guessing colours. Up to 30 materials per call. (3) Live tab now shows a Materials panel (auto-refresh every 5s + manual ↻ Refresh) so designers see exactly which materials Gemini will receive before each render. Tied to the same scope priority. Default prompt no longer hardcodes 'light oak / white wall' — it defers to whatever the user actually painted in SU.
